verses.1: The Lord GOD’s Spirit is on me,
verses.2: to proclaim the year of the LORD’s favor
verses.3: to provide for those who mourn in Zion,
verses.4: They will rebuild the old ruins.
verses.5: Strangers will stand and feed your flocks.
verses.6: But you will be called the LORD’s priests.
verses.7: Instead of your shame you will have double.
verses.9: Their offspring will be known among the nations,
verses.10: I will greatly rejoice in the LORD!
verses.11: For as the earth produces its bud,
